name: kstack
description: Codex-first workflow pack with canonical repo-local state, browser QA, and shipping skills.

scripts.build: ${BUN_BIN:-bun} run gen:skill-docs && ${BUN_BIN:-bun} build --compile browse/src/cli.ts --outfile browse/dist/browse && ${BUN_BIN:-bun} build --compile browse/src/find-browse.ts --outfile browse/dist/find-browse && ${BUN_BIN:-bun} build --compile design/src/cli.ts --outfile design/dist/design && ${BUN_BIN:-bun} build --compile bin/kstack-state.ts --outfile bin/kstack-state && bash browse/scripts/build-node-server.sh && git rev-parse HEAD > browse/dist/.version && git rev-parse HEAD > design/dist/.version && rm -f .*.bun-build || true
